svg.text: Model Cards: Generation, D4D Harmonization, and Evaluation
LinkML schema · multi-method extraction · external D4D references · hybrid + LLM rubric scoring · CI-gated portfolio

g.text: HuggingFace Hub README · GitHub MODEL_CARD.md · papers / arXiv · DOIs · KOGUT docs
Portfolio: climate-extended · climate-forecasting · sentiment · densenet121 · subcell-saprot · minimal fixtures
Model Card LinkML schemas (source of truth)

Generates: JSON Schema · OWL · SHACL · GraphQL · Protobuf · Python dataclasses · Excel · SQL DDL · groups: Core · ModelDetails · Datasets · Params · Performance · Considerations · Benchmarking · Extended (DOE)
Source docs → preprocessed text → Model Card YAML, by one of several methods.
Modes: URL ingest (HF Hub / GitHub / arXiv) · DOI via ARTL MCP
Workflow steps: prerequisites · fetch · generate · validate · open PR · comment
CI gate on PR: mc-rubric20-gate.yml (blocking, hybrid scorer)
make gen-project · make test-{schema,python,examples} · make lint
linkml-validate; in-CI mc-rubric20 hybrid gate runs on every PR
{model}_metadata.yaml records model, git SHA, extraction ID
Same inputs → same Model Card (enables cross-method comparison)
Replace lightweight inline fields with ID + URI references to comprehensive D4D instances. No schema imports — clean separation.
base · 34 classes · inline owner / dataSet / funding
References are plain id + uri pairs
D4D instances live in the data-sheets-schema repo
"Document datasets once, reference from many cards"
Two axes: which rubric (10 vs 20) × which evaluator (deterministic hybrid vs LLM-as-judge).
mc-rubric10 · mc-rubric10-semantic · mc-rubric20 · mc-rubric20-semantic · mc-description-reviewer · mc-validator · mc-schema-expert
Blocking PR gate: mc-rubric20-gate.yml (hybrid; bakes in semantic findings — Q18 train/eval leakage, Q19 bias↔tradeoffs)
Weekly: mc-rubric20-portfolio-audit.yml — re-runs hybrid across portfolio, opens PR with regenerated badges + common_issues.md
data/evaluation/{all, badges, extended, harmonized, hf_hub, fixtures}/ · portfolio.html · portfolio_compare.html · common_issues.md
per-card SVG badge (rubric × evaluator) shown in README · per-rubric JSON with score + rationale + evidence
